Video.summary: Have you ever felt like your hormones are playing a tune out of sync with your well-being? Chances are, they probably are. The good news? There's a transformative journey waiting for women when they realign with nature, pay attention to their meals, and practice intermittent fasting the right way.
Video.title: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Image.alt: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Video.summary: Your day 6 practice invites you to use core work to get clear. In this session we use controlled movement to activate the muscles of the abdominal for a strong and healthy back and strengthen your whole self.
Video.title: Day 6: Clarity

Video.summary: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.
Video.title: Day 7: Prana

Video.summary: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.
Video.title: Day 9: Bold

Video.summary: Your day 10 practice starts with a standing warm up and eases into a yoga flow for balance and transformation! Bring calm alertness to the mind and body as you continue to ride the wave of the breath. Build a strong foundation to set yourself up for greatness. Be patient and courageous.
Video.title: Day 10: Balance

Video.summary: Stomach aches and pains are a common complaint. Here are the signs that the problem could be serious.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Gastro

Video.summary: Back pain is one of the most common conditions today but there are treatments, exercises, and therapies that can relieve the pain that don’t involve either narcotics or surgery. But if those interventions are needed you want to make sure you have what you need to make an informed decision
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Back Pain

Video.summary: Alzheimer’s disease affects millions of people around the world, robbing them of their memory and of so much of their lives. There is still no sure but there are some treatments and active clinical trials that are offering promise. In this program, we discuss some of the lifestyle changes people can make to help prevent or at least slow down the progression of Alzheimer’s and stay as mentally healthy as possible.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future
Dr. Q&A - Alzheimer's Disease: Hope For The Future

Video.summary: Founder, Glenn Marsden, of Imperfectly Perfect Campaign, and Jeremy Jackson, former Baywatch star share their personal journeys with body dysmorphia and how it led to a worldwide campaign. A young man faces his fears and a tale of kindness at 30,000 ft.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Imperfectly Perfect

Video.summary: Laura Di Franco, CEO of Brave Healer Productions, discusses brave healing and the power of sharing our stories. And, meet Oyen the ginger cat and adorable kids from India, along with Daaji redefining meditation for a joyful heart.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing
Good Morning Joy - Steps to Brave Healing

Video.summary: Join The Kitchen Psychic, Hannah McKitrick, as we talk ditching diets, embracing food freedom, and finding lightness in mind and body, alongside Susan Noles from The Golden Bachelor for some fun, and meditation leader Daaji discussing compassion.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After
Good Morning Joy - Eat Happily Ever After

Video.summary: Mary Morrissey, with cameo appearances by Les Brown, David Meltzer, Bob Proctor and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Mary Morrissey

Video.summary: Blaine Bartlett, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Blaine Bartlett

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Hollywood Actress Jenifer Lewis. Talks Career, Legacy, and Hollywood Star
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Jenifer Lewis

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Jenifer Lewis
Pull Up The Curtain - Jenifer Lewis
Pull Up The Curtain - Jenifer Lewis

Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson
Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson
Pull Up The Curtain - Haywood Nelson

Video.summary: An In-Depth interview with Ethel Love. Talks 2Pac, Brenda’s Got a Baby Music Video Shoot, and Her Life
Video.grandparentTitle: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier
Video.title: Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love

Image.alt: Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love
Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love
Pull Up The Curtain - Ethel Love

Video.summary: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Did you know being active in the gym could improve your activity in the bedroom? Everything you wanted to ask about sex but didn’t. Now you can on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out
Sex Talk - The Sexual Benefits of Working Out

Video.summary: A man gets terrible headaches right at the height of passion. And a woman won’t talk about her sexual desires. What should her partner do? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex
Sex Talk - It’s Alright to Talk About Sex

Video.summary: A man wonders if he should look for love while his wife battles dementia and the classic tale of the G spot gets a rewriting. This week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Video.summary: A man falls asleep during sex. Is it a medical emergency? And could testosterone gel be the cure for painful sex in seniors? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Video.summary: Think you need a little nip or tuck? Want answers about fillers or Botox? Need advice about hair loss ? Our expert talks about all that and much more. Plus he highlights a new procedure that can help people who have had suffered traumatic injuries to their limbs.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions
Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions
Dr. Q&A - A Plastic Surgeon Answers Your Questions

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr Jill Bolte Taylor, a Harvard-trained and published neuroanatomist. She shares with us the idea of cellular circuitry and how there are four distinct modules of cells that make up who we are, combining the thinking mind and the emotional side. She discusses her new book, Whole Brain Living: The Anatomy of Choice and the Four Characteristics that Drive Our Life.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice

Video.summary: In our very first solo episode of Rooted in Wellness, we explore the transformative power of being anchored like a sturdy tree—steady, grounded, and unwavering amidst life's storms. We'll illuminate how feeling rooted manifests as inner peace, emotional stability, and a profound connection with yourself and the world around you.
Video.title: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Image.alt: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Video.summary: Bob Proctor, with cameo appearances by Les Brown, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Bob Proctor

Video.summary: Lisa Nichols, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Sharon Lechter, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Lisa Nichols

Video.summary: Les Brown, with cameo appearances by Bob Proctor, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Les Brown

Video.summary: Raelene S. Weaver, author and TEDx speaker who's breaking barriers by normalizing boys' emotions. Witness a touching moment as a man in Italy feels a human touch after 30 years, and Daaji joins for another inspiring segment on our Soul Hugs series.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code
Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code
Good Morning Joy - The New Boy Code

Video.summary: "Play To Win" pits a group of contestants from around the world against one another for a chance to compete for a life-changing job or a six-figure coaching opportunity with the HIGDON GROUP.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 1

Video.summary: Why do women orgasm less than men in heterosexual relationships? Schuyler Grant and experts Dr. Jolene Brighten, Dr. Marisa Snyder, and Rosie Acosta unpack the orgasm gap, clitoral anatomy, arousal vs. desire, and why penetration-focused sex falls short—plus practical tools for better intimacy and pleasure.
Video.title: Episode 1: The Orgasm Gap

Video.summary: Why does your libido disappear, your mood swing, and brain fog take over? Schuyler Grant and experts Dr. Jolene Brighten, Dr. Marisa Snyder, and Rosie Acosta explain how estrogen and progesterone shape your brain, especially in perimenopause, and share tools to calm your nervous system and take back control.
Video.title: Episode 2: Sex Between Your Ears

Video.summary: Turned on but not wet? Schuyler Grant and experts Dr. Jolene Brighten, Dr. Marisa Snyder, and Rosie Acosta unpack arousal non-concordance, vaginal pH, estrogen’s role, and common myths. Learn what’s normal, when to seek care, and how vaginal health connects to overall wellbeing—science-based and shame-free.
Video.title: Episode 3: Vagina Conspiracies

Video.summary: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.
Video.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
